name: Cherry Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Combine the cracker crumbs, brown sugar and butter in a small bowl, blending well. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar and vanilla, blending well. Gently fold the stiffly beaten egg whites into the mixture.
4. Pour the filling over the crust in the pie dish.
5. Bake for 25 minutes or until set. Cool on a wire rack.
6. Drain cherries, reserving juice. Add reserved juice, red food coloring, remaining sugar and cornstarch to a saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
7. Arrange cherries over the cheese filling. Pour glaze over the cherries.
8. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour in the refrigerator or until glazed is set. Serve cold.
